audit_items.proof_trace: The s_entered guard is set to true at L418 before every external call in bid() (safeTransfer L444, auctionCallback L449, safeTransferFrom L453), so any reentrant call to bid() reverts with ReentrantCall(). OZ SafeERC20.safeTransfer correctly reverts when a non-standard token returns false, which causes the entire transaction to revert including the s_entered=true state change, preventing any stuck-lock scenario.
